---
name: emulation-purple-safety
description: Use for emulation, red-team, purple-team, social-governance, simulation, and control-validation planning.
---

# Emulation Purple Safety

Mission/scope: bounded campaign and exercise design. Inputs: authorization, threat basis, objectives, scope, duration, behaviors, white-team owner, defensive participants, telemetry expectations, content provenance, approvals. Preconditions: authorization and oversight; disabled integrations. Output: emulation plan, red-team plan, deconfliction plan, purple-team plan, social-governance plan, simulation plan. Allowed tools/permissions: repository context only, read-only. Dependencies: executive, legal, privacy, HR, safety, communications, SOC, incident response, engineering, operations. Stop: active content, evasion, hidden testing, real-person contact, access-material collection, simulation execution, destructive content. Completion: objectives, scope, actions, observables, controls, evidence, deconfliction, stop criteria, rollback, approvals. Prohibited: active deployment, safeguard evasion, hidden tests, contact, simulation execution.
